settings.heroTitle: Our Small Effort Makes A Powerful Change
settings.heroSubtitle: Social accountability is at the heart of everything we do. Every being on this planet is born with an innate sense of responsibility — we act on it together.
settings.aboutLead: Social Accountability is a matter of great and important responsibility. Every being on this planet is born with an innate sense of responsibility. We human beings may not always be able to carry out our duties, but we try our best.
settings.aboutDesc: SRAA3 Foundation works tirelessly across education, healthcare, nutrition, and community development — reaching those who need it most.

aboutFeatures.title: Education For All
aboutFeatures.description: Providing quality learning opportunities to underprivileged children and youth.

aboutFeatures.title: Health & Wellness
aboutFeatures.description: Free medical camps and healthcare services for remote and underserved communities.

aboutFeatures.title: Long-Term Impact
aboutFeatures.description: We focus on sustainable change, not just immediate relief.

activities.title: Child Education
activities.description: Building schools, sponsoring students, and training teachers to create lasting educational ecosystems.

activities.title: Medical Help
activities.description: Organising free health camps, medicine drives, and connecting communities with essential care.

activities.title: Nutritious Food
activities.description: Running food distribution programs to ensure no child or family goes to bed hungry.

activities.title: Clean Water
activities.description: Installing water pumps and purification systems in villages without access to safe drinking water.

causes.title: Better Education For All
causes.description: Every child deserves access to quality education regardless of their background or economic status.

causes.title: Health Care For All
causes.description: Providing accessible, affordable medical care to communities who have been left behind by the system.

causes.title: Ensure Healthy Food For All
causes.description: Combating hunger and malnutrition through sustainable food programs and community kitchens.

team.name: Ahmed Raza
team.description: Visionary leader with 15+ years in community development and social impact.

team.name: Sara Ali
team.description: Oversees all field programs and ensures resources reach those who need them most.

team.name: Dr. Asim Khan
team.description: Leads all healthcare initiatives and medical camp programmes across regions.

team.name: Nadia Hussain
team.description: Builds school partnerships and manages our scholarship and tutoring programs.

blog.title: How We Helped 200 Children Get Back to School This Year
blog.description: Through targeted scholarships and infrastructure support, SRAA3 made a real difference in the 2024–25 school year.

blog.title: Free Medical Camp Reaches 500 Families in Rural Areas
blog.description: Our volunteer doctors spent three days providing free checkups, medicines, and follow-up care to underserved families.

blog.title: Clean Water Arrives in Three Villages After 6-Month Project
blog.description: Over 1,200 residents now have access to safe drinking water, dramatically reducing waterborne illness in the region.
